revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:茶臼山古墳]]
'''Chausuyama Kofun''' (茶臼山古墳) is the name of several {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}}, or ancient Japanese Kofuns. The name originates from the resemblance of the {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} type of kofun to a "chausu" (millstone). Many kofun share this name, and additional descriptors such as place names are often used for identification. [[File:Chausu 01.jpg|200px|thumb|A chausu millstone]] * {{ill|Chausuyama Kofun (Mibu)|ja|羽生田茶臼山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chausuyama Kofun (Mibu)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 茶臼山古墳 (壬生町)}} (Mibu, Tochigi Prefecture, zenpo-koho-fun type) - Designated as a National Historic Site. * {{ill|Akabori Chausuyama Kofun|ja|赤堀茶臼山古墳|1=Akabori Chausuyama Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akabori Chausuyama Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Akabori Chausuyama Kofun|qq=}} (Isesaki, Gunma Prefecture) * {{ill|Bessho Chausuyama Kofun|ja|別所茶臼山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bessho Chausuyama Kofun|qq=}} (Enpukuji/Bessho Chausuyama Kofun, Gunma Prefecture) - Part of the {{ill|Nitta Sho Site|ja|新田荘遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nitta Sho Site|1=Nitta Manor Ruins|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11503769}}, a National Historic Site. * {{ill|Chausuyama Kofun (Ōtsu)|ja|膳所茶臼山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chausuyama Kofun (Ōtsu)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 茶臼山古墳 (大津市)}} (Otsu, Shiga Prefecture) - Designated as a National Historic Site. * {{ill|Konooka Kofun Group|lt=Konooka Kofun Group|lt=Kinooka Chausuyama Kofun|ja|木の岡茶臼山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinooka Chausuyama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木の岡古墳群}} (Otsu, Shiga Prefecture) - A detached section of the {{ill|Imperial Mausoleum Reference Land|ja|陵墓参考地|1=Candidate Imperial Mausoleum|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imperial Mausoleum Reference Land|13=User:Immanuelle/Candidate Imperial Mausoleum|qq=}}. * {{ill|Obata Chausuyama Kofun|ja|小幡茶臼山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Obata Chausuyama Kofun|qq=}} (Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture) * Chausuyama Kofun (Inuyama, Aichi Prefecture) ⇒ {{ill|Aotsuka Kofun|ja|青塚古墳史跡公園|lt=Aotsuka Kofun Historic Park|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aotsuka Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 青塚古墳 (犬山市)}} - Designated as a National Historic Site. * {{ill|Chausuyama Kofun (Osaka)|ja|茶臼山古墳 (大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chausuyama Kofun (Osaka City)|qq=}} (Tennoji, Osaka Prefecture) - Used as the main camp for {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} during the Winter Siege of Osaka and for {{ill|Sanada Yukimura|en|Sanada Yukimura|qid=Q3948081|lt=Sanada Yukimura|1=Sanada Yukimura}} during the Summer Siege. * {{ill|Ōta Chausuyama Kofun|lt=Ōta Chausuyama Kofun|lt=Ota Chausuyama Kofun|ja|太田茶臼山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ota Chausuyama Kofun|qq=}} (Ibaraki, Osaka Prefecture) - Identified by the Imperial Household Agency as the mausoleum of {{ill|Emperor Keitai|en|Emperor Keitai|qid=Q349277|lt=Emperor Keitai|1=Emperor Keitai}}. * {{ill|Ikeda Chausuyama Kofun|ja|池田茶臼山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikeda Chausuyama Kofun|qq=}} (Ikeda, Osaka Prefecture) - Preserved as part of Chausuyama Park through conservation efforts. * {{ill|Sakurai Chausuyama Kofun|en|Sakurai Chausuyama Kofun|qid=Q11537882|lt=Sakurai Chausuyama Kofun|1=Sakurai Chausuyama Kofun}} (Sakurai, Nara Prefecture) - Designated as a National Historic Site. * {{ill|Chausuyama Kofun (Yamatotakada)|ja|茶臼山古墳 (大和高田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chausuyama Kofun (Yamatotakada)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yamatotakada, Nara Prefecture) - Managed by the Imperial Household Agency as a Kofun associated with the {{ill|Tsukiyama Kofun (Yamatotakada)|ja|築山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukiyama Kofun (Yamatotakada)|qq=}}. * {{ill|Urama Chausuyama Kofun|en|Urama Chausuyama Kofun|qid=Q11558379|lt=Urama Chausuyama Kofun|1=Urama Chausuyama Kofun}} (Okayama, Okayama Prefecture) - Designated as a National Historic Site. * {{ill|Nakayama Chausuyama Kofun|ja|中山茶臼山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakayama Chausuyama Kofun|qq=}} (Okayama, Okayama Prefecture) - Recognized as an Imperial Mausoleum Reference Land. * {{ill|Ryōgūzan Kofun|lt=Wada Chausuyama Kofun|ja|和田茶臼山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryōgūzan Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 両宮山古墳}} (Akaiwa, Okayama Prefecture) - Designated as a National Historic Site as part of the {{ill|Ryōgūzan Kofun|en|Ryōgūzan Kofun|qid=Q11362631|lt=Ryomiyama Kofun|1=Ryōgūzan Kofun}} group. * {{ill|Tomida Chausuyama Kofun|en|Tomida Chausuyama Kofun|qid=Q11457254|lt=Tomida Chausuyama Kofun|1=Tomida Chausuyama Kofun}} (Sanuki, Kagawa Prefecture) - Designated as a National Historic Site. * {{ill|Takamatsu Chausuyama Kofun|ja|高松茶臼山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamatsu Chausuyama Kofun|qq=}} (Takamatsu, Kagawa Prefecture) * {{ill|Yanai Chausuyama Kofun|en|Yanai Chausuyama Kofun|qid=Q11534089|lt=Yanai Chausuyama Kofun|1=Yanai Chausuyama Kofun}} (Yanai, Yamaguchi Prefecture) - Designated as a National Historic Site.
== See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Japan|1=list of kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11505809}} * {{ill|Chausuzuka Kofun|ja|茶臼塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chausuzuka Kofun|qq=}}
{{Kofun navbar|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|茶臼山古墳|version=76140514|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:茶臼山古墳]]
